entry.title: New IDC AIDDOTI000800033 awarded to DOMESTIC AWARDEES (UNDISCLOSED) for the amount of $25,000

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE OBJECTIVE OF THIS INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT (IQC) IS TO PROVIDE THE OFFICE OF TRANSITION INITIATIVES (OTI) WITH THE MEANS TO SUPPORT U.S. FOREIGN POLICY OBJECTIVES BY HELPING LOCAL PARTNERS ADVANCE PEACE AND DEMOCRACY IN PRIORITY COUNTRIES IN CRISIS. OTI?S PROGRAM TEAM, COMPRISING OTI AND CONTRACTOR PERSONNEL, WILL WORK ON THE GROUND TO PROVIDE FAST, FLEXIBLE, SHORT-TERM ASSISTANCE TARGETED AT KEY POLITICAL TRANSITION AND STABILIZATION NEEDS. THROUGH SPECIFIC TASK ORDERS, THE CONTRACTOR WILL ESTABLISH, STAFF, MANAGE, OPERATE, AND SUPPORT A FLEXIBLE QUICK-RESPONSE MECHANISM CAPABLE OF ADMINISTERING AND IMPLEMENTING TARGETED ACTIVITIESTAS::72 1027::TAS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL MANAGEMENT CONSULTING SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorAlternateName: FEDERAL EGOV IAE INITIATIVE - GENERIC DUNS

entry.title: IDC AIDDOTI000800033 (1) awarded to DOMESTIC AWARDEES (UNDISCLOSED), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: M/OAA IS REQUESTED TO AMEND A NO-COST MOD TO THE SWIFT III BASIC IQC W. THE FOLLOWING; ACTIVITES MANUAL APPROVAL, CHANGING LANGUAGE RELATED TO THRESHOLDS FOR FOGS. CTO RICK SWANSON

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO (1) CHANGE ANY REFERENCES TO THE CTO TO REFERENCES TO THE COTR, (2) INCORPORATE BY REFERENCE E-VERIFICATION CLAUSE AND THE COMPETITION IN SUBCONTRACTING CLAUSE IN SECTION I OF THE CONTRACT.
